pr_title: Expose the client classes from the package root
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
+
+from clients.http import HttpClient
+from clients.queue import QueueClient
+
+if TYPE_CHECKING:
+    from clients.config import ClientConfig
+
+__all__ = ["HttpClient", "QueueClient"]
+
+
+def make_client(kind, config):
+    cls = HttpClient if kind == "http" else QueueClient
+    return cls(config)

triage: {"file_tiers": {"clients/__init__.py": "deep"}, "overall_risk": "low", "relevant_dimensions": ["code_quality"], "reasoning": "Review the package init; imports are __all__ re-exports plus a TYPE_CHECKING-only name."}
